mapper.select: select * from CMSMV where 1 = 1 and MV001 like '%' + #{MV001} + '%' or MV002 like '%' + #{MV001} + '%'

SELECT MV001,MV002 from CMSMV
MV002 like '%' + #{employeeName} + '%'

SELECT DISTINCT A.USER_ID userId,A.LOGONNAME MV001,A.USER_NAME MV002,A.UDF026 UDF01, E.EMPLOYEE_ID employeeId,E.EMPLOYEE_CODE employeeNo, E.EMPLOYEE_NAME employName , AU.ADMIN_UNIT_ID departmentUuid,AU.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE departmentCode,AU.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME departmentName FROM [USER] A LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMPLOYEE_ID = E.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_D F ON E.EMPLOYEE_ID=F.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AU ON F.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = AU.ADMIN_UNIT_ID WHERE LOGONNAME = #{userId}
